transcript.text: Probably, among all the sundae places, we should have the highest sales in the country The number of employees we have is 50 (The sudaeguk place with the highest sales in the country) (where all the people who live in Songpa-gu know about...?) (I'm very curious about this sundaeguk) (Intense exploration) They look amazing! (

Even the soup is different...?!) Wow, the color of the soup is very white (Agreed) It's delicious (PD couldn't stay patient because of this legendary sundaeguk..) This is the last cut for me today (Strike?) (I'm going to eat, too!) (Because they fell in love with the sundaeguk...) (nobody cares about shooting anymore..) (

Will Tzuyang be able to finish filming this video..?) What is this? (This is near Songpa-gu Police Hospital) Hello, everyone I came to Songpa-gu today Today, I'm here to try the most famous sundaeguk place It's a sundaeguk place everyone in Songpa-gu knows about It's open 24 hours so there are a lot of people in the early morning as well I drank so much yesterday for today's sundaeguk mukbang! (Hangover) I'm dying inside..

Anyway, I'm going to have sundaeguk today! Here! (Located in Songpa-gu) Ta-da! 'Hamgyeongdo Chapssal Sundae' (As of December 2022) I saw they have more than 8k reviews! That's just amazing! Anyway, I'll check it out (Entering the restaurant) Hello! Hello! (The 1st owner was about to reject the filming) My dad told me he was gonna reject the shooting today but when he told me, "

Tzuyang..? Something like that" (You have to say YES if it's Tzuyang, dad!) Really? (What an achievement) I told him it's an achievement...LOL (It's the first official shooting..?!) If someone just comes alone and take it, they don't need our permission (Thanks to the 2nd owner) The first permitted shooting ever?! (The 1st owner) Hello I

heard you are very famous...! - (I'm so flattered, haha) - You're very pretty and young (25 years of history, 23 years in Songpa-gu) It has been 25 years in total now Probably, among all the sundae places, we should have the highest sales in the country The number of employees we have is 50 Woah, really?!? Of course!! I drank so much last night so I'm going to go easy today - 3 sundaeguk - 3 and 1 assorted suyuk and 1 iron-pan vegetable stir-fry, please (

That's going easy...?) You're unbelievable (Let's check out the best sundaeguk in the country) We'll get them ready now Thank you (Sundaeguk that will resolve the upset tummy) (Chewy and savory assorted suyuk) (Iron-pan vegetable stir-fry that will be cooked on the table) (Sundaeguk is here) Here they are Wow, it looks delicious - This is assorted suyuk - Okay! It looks so delicious

(Everything is here) I'm so excited! I should take one sundaeguk here Wow, the color of this sundaeguk is very white, the soup It's different than the typical sundaeguk it looks like it'll be very flavorful There is spicy sauce inside as well Does it usually come with it like this? Bon appétit Starting with the soup first It's not fully seasoned yet, right? W

ow, but it's still delicious...! (Adding saeu-jeot to season and trying it again...!) Wow, the soup is so flavorful! My hangover is already gone! The soup is really nice Usually, sundaeguk is quite similar everywhere (This is first time ever...) but this one is definitely different from the other typical ones I don't think I've tasted anything like this! I'll try the meat as well Wait! When I tried the soup, I just thought I'd just keep eating the soup but the meat is so tender and there is no smell at all It's delicious! (PD got the right choice again...!) You're doing well these days!

(He got a job offer from Michelin...) (Mythomania) He's very delusional sometimes (I'll cook the stir-fry now) (A beautiful transformation of sundae) This is no joke - Do you like it? - Yes, it's so good! (It has sundae, gopchang, glass noodles, and vegetables..) There are a lot of glass noodles as well! Everything is already cooked, I'm just heating them up again (Stir-fry is ready) Thank you Wow, since it's just cooked, I'll try it right away Wow, I didn't know there'll be gopchang because it doesn't say (One stone, two birds) but I've been craving gopchang for a while now

This is exactly what I've been craving! I can smell the smoky flavor so there is no meat smell It's sweet and spicy I like the smoky flavor! It's so good! (The glass noodles are well-done as well) (Plum juice) Amazing! Thank you so much! - (You're welcome) - Thank you (Plum juice is better than soda for a hangover) I didn't feel like drinking soda because of the hangover The sauce is sweet and salty with the smoky flavor

so everyone will like it I have to eat all the glass noodles before they get soggy I'll cut kkakdugi... (Kkakdugi is the best with sundaeguk..!) like this It cuts so easily What is this? It doesn't feel like I'm cutting kkakdugi (Please tell me where to get these scissors...) Is it because of the scissors? (Confused) Oh wait (Got a bit confused after kkakdugi) I was gonna have rice later, not yet Wow, this is amazing

(Trustful staring at PD) It's so good! First of all, the meat is amazing There is not a piece of tough meat The meat itself is so delicious Oop Oops Should I try sundae? Dipping in salt The skin of the sundae is very thin (It just pops in my mouth!) It feels like it just pops in my mouth and.. (

Glutinous sundae filling..!) the filling is very glutinous Ssamjang! (Great excuse for drinking) It's a good thing that I drank last night! I'll try the suyuk as well (PD's recommendation) PD recommended this for me! He said I'll like it (Cold dish, assorted suyuk) I like this But this is a cold dish, cold suyuk! (Crunchy) I like the texture! Intestine...! Oh no, is this ear? No? (It is) (

No smell at all...!) Usually when the meat is cold, it can smell but this one doesn't smell at all! Tteok! (We'll heat it up for you) (It's back) Thank you! How do you like everything so far? - It's so delicious! - That's good! I'll add this in the soup (Try to heat up the suyuk this time...!) Put it in the soup for a bit I think it's tongue but even the tongue doesn't smell at all (Tzuyang is usually sensitive to smell) I don't even eat cow tongue because I don't like the smell of it Wow, this is so good (The restaurant is getting filled with people already...) It has so many tables but it's already filled up

It's not even 12PM yet It's 11... It's 11:20AM now This is really chewy! Amazing! I'll put this in the soup as well Wow, the meat is unbelievably delicious (It's almost full now) I think the restaurant will be full by 12PM (Already sold out) (

Should leave soon...?) I feel like I should eat quickly and leave because there are so many customers (You're torturing me, hangover!) but I can't eat fast because of my hangover (She's drinking plum juice to treat her hangover...) I can't stop drinking the juice! (※Excessive drinking is harmful to your health) Did I drink too much last night? (Mr. Tzu, are you okay..?) (Hangover bomb) I'm curing my hangover right now...

Everything is so tender (How could you forget about it for a gukbap...?) I forgot about the rice... Should I mix it? (This is gukbap...!) (2nd delivery) Thank you! Wow, the skin is so thin that I really like the popping texture (Let's see)

I personally think adding them in here will be more delicious! (Taking the action right away) (Gotta mix it to make it more delicious...!) (Some are recognizing her, thank you!) PD, it's your best gukbap place, why don't you have some? I already ordered (I was just kidding though...?) This is my last cut I set up mine here Huh? (Fixed angle) You fixed it here?! (PD) (

Are you kidding me...?) (But I'll be generous since it's your favorite place...) (Thanks) (The worker is serving the food to PD as well) (Delayed confirmation) Can I eat...? Sure LOL (Let's see how well you can eat...) Eat this as well (Please give me mercy, boss..) It's delicious... (Let me try as well) You're really eating...! (Would you like to try mukbang?) Shall I film you? (

Exhausted shoulders of a Korean dad...) He's enjoying it over there (I feel compassionate...) He couldn't stay patient today I'm so thirsty because of my hangover (Woozy) I feel tired all of a sudden (But there is no time for that...) There is a waiting line!!(?) People are lined up? (The line is huge) (A very long waiting list) (Wow... That's really long...) (

Customers are flooding in for lunch time...) (We decided to pack it up and make the table available...!) I came in the morning to avoid the rush hour (Two tables for filming...) but the waiting line is so long and I'm taking up two tables right now I'll just pack it up and... Uh.... (I'll quickly finish this) I'll turn it off for now? (Yes, turn it off!) We're in trouble...

(The owner purposely didn't tell her) I didn't want you to feel rushed... No, it's okay! I should've finished it earlier (Lighting OFF) What is going on?!?! (The microphone is OFF as well...) (I'm leaving with a legendary sad ending...)
